steps: Contact Deutsche Bank Custody to report overpayment of EUR 3,093.75 on DBK dividend payment
Reference DE-NO tax treaty Article 10 allowing 26.375% withholding vs. applied 25% standard rate
Request immediate refund processing with corrected tax calculation documentation
Escalate to Deutsche Bank's dividend reconciliation team if initial contact doesn't resolve within 5 business days

references.title: German Federal Ministry of Finance – Tax Treaties
